nasb.text: And so it was, that when the bearers of the ark of the Lord had gone six paces, he sacrificed an ox and a fatling.

esv.text: And when those who bore the ark of the Lord had gone six steps, he sacrificed an ox and a fattened animal.

cnv.text: 那些抬耶和華的約櫃的人走了六步，大衛就獻一頭公牛和一隻肥畜為祭。

ccb.text: 这一次，抬耶和华约柜的人走了六步，大卫就献上公牛和肥犊为祭。
